headline: Merck Snags A First-Of-Its-Kind Approval, And Shares Jump
summary: Merck snagged the first-ever approval for a PCSK9 pill to lower LDL cholesterol, starting a new rivalry with injection-makers.

headline: Collect 9.8% On VRTX Stock Now, And Still Keep 15% Of Upside
summary: Get paid a guaranteed income on your Vertex shares today, which you keep no matter what, for agreeing to sell them at a higher price if the stock keeps climbing.

headline: Merck Stock Rises After U.S. Approval for Powerful Cholesterol-Cutting Pill
summary: It’s the first pill that lowers blood cholesterol far better than statins—medicines that a quarter of adults take to reduce their risk of heart attack and stroke.
